title: Crockpot Chicken Veggie Quinoa Soup
description: Try this simple Quinoa Soup recipe! Perfect for busy nights, it’s hearty, nutritious, and practically cooks itself.

ingredients.item: fire-roasted crushed tomatoes or diced tomatoes
boneless, skinless chicken thighs or breasts

instructions: Heat olive oil in a slow cooker or sauté pan over medium-high heat. Add onion, carrots, and celery, and sauté for 5-7 minutes. Add garlic, tomato paste, cajun seasoning, bouillon powder, oregano, cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper. Sauté for 5 more minutes. Pour in tomatoes and stir, scraping the bottom.
Trim fat off the chicken and cut into large pieces.

Transfer sautéed mixture to the slow cooker (if needed). Add chicken, pinto beans, corn, quinoa, 1/2 cup orange juice extracted from the orange, bay leaves, and chicken stock. Mix well. Slow cook on high for 3-5 hours.
Remove chicken and shred with 2 forks. Return shredded chicken to the slow cooker. Remove and discard bay leaves. Taste and add salt or pepper if needed.
Serve garnished with desired toppings like cheese, cilantro, lime, or sour cream.
